description: Real-world L1 queries phrased the way an agent (or merchant) would type them, mapped to the KB record(s) that SHOULD win. Used by scripts/eval-kb.mjs to catch coverage gaps (no matching record) and searchability gaps (record exists but its symptom/tags don't contain the words people use). Add a case whenever a zero-result search shows up in Insights.
